# igo

igo is an AI-friendly Go web framework.

Use these files first:

- `AGENTS.md`: short agent guide
- `CLAUDE.md`: framework conventions and command list
- `docs/ai.md`: AI metadata contract

Core commands:

- `go test ./...`
- `go run ./cmd/igo doctor .`
- `go run ./cmd/igo ai context . --format json`
- `go run ./cmd/igo ai routes .`
- `go run ./cmd/igo ai schemas .`
- `go run ./cmd/igo ai errors`
- `go run ./cmd/igo ai openapi .`
- `go run ./cmd/igo ai prompt . METHOD PATH`

Runtime metadata endpoints are enabled by `app.RegisterAIRoutes()`:

- `/_ai/routes`
- `/_ai/schemas`
- `/_ai/errors`
- `/_ai/info`
- `/_ai/openapi`
- `/_ai/conventions`
- `/_ai/middlewares`

Preferred handler helpers:

- `igo.BindAndValidate[T](c)` for JSON body
- `igo.BindQueryAndValidate[T](c)` for query parameters
- `igo.BindPathAndValidate[T](c)` for path parameters
- `c.InternalErrorWrap`, `c.NotFoundWrap`, `c.BadRequestWrap`, `c.ValidationErrorWrap` for error branches
